summary: Closeout packet for plan_2026_05_05_ops_workspace_gui (verdict: checkpoint_complete). 2 memory candidates.

extracted.text: Ops freshness is derived from existing status + age, not stored as parallel field
extracted.rationale: Per Phase 0 state contract, freshness (live|idle|stale|parked|archived) is computed from (record_type, status, age_seconds) using the freshness_derivation_table baked into plan.json. Never stored alongside existing status fields.

extracted.text: Ops command endpoints with destructive scope require governance token
extracted.rationale: POST /api/ops/command/{purge,cancel,archive,migrate,promote} return 403 without a governance approval token matching plans/registry.json governance.hard_stop_conditions.

open_gaps: Real governance token issuance (currently dev-bypass token only)
Pulse, Plans, Tasks, Runs, Proofs, Agents, Reviews, Gaps, Memory, Debt sub-tabs (placeholders only in MVP)
Cross-link schema migrations (origin_job_id, promoted_to_task_id) on existing ledger records
